g.text: ZeRO-3 Parameter Gathering During Forward Pass
Process Grid: DP × TP × PP = Total GPUs
Data Parallel: Gradient Synchronization via AllReduce

ul.li: Each rank sends 1/N of gradients to next
Final sums distributed to all ranks
N-1 steps, all ranks receive full result Bandwidth: 2(N-1)/N × GradientSize Latency: 2(N-1) × α (network latency)

g.text: Tensor Parallel: Model Sharding with Activation AllReduce

div.p: Input X: [batch, seq, hidden] First Linear (Column Parallel): Y₁ = X @ W₁ (on TP rank 0) Y₂ = X @ W₂ (on TP rank 1) ... AllReduce: Y = Σ(Yᵢ) Second Linear (Row Parallel): Z₁ = Y[0:25%] @ V₁ Z₂ = Y[25:50%] @ V₂ ... Output: Z = Σ(Zᵢ) via AllReduce
Multi-Head Attention:

ul.li: TP=4, 32 heads → 8 heads per rank Q = X @ Wq (sharded by heads) K = X @ Wk (sharded by heads) V = X @ Wv (sharded by heads) Attention = softmax(QKᵀ/√d) @ V Output Projection: Out = Concat(heads) @ Wo AllReduce across TP ranks

div.p: Warmup Phase: Stage 0: F0 F1 F2 F3 Stage 1: F0 F1 F2 F3 Stage 2: F0 F1 F2 F3 Stage 3: F0 F1 F2 F3 Steady State (1F1B): Stage 0: B0 F4 B1 F5 B2 F6 B3 F7 Stage 1: B0 F4 B1 F5 B2 F6 B3 F7 Stage 2: B0 F4 B1 F5 B2 F6 B3 F7 Stage 3: B0 F4 B1 F5 B2 F6 B3 F7 Cooldown Phase: Stage 0: B4 B5 B6 B7 Stage 1: B4 B5 B6 B7 Stage 2: B4 B5 B6 B7 Stage 3: B4 B5 B6 B7
F = Forward, B = Backward, Number = Micro-batch ID

g.text: ZeRO: Zero Redundancy Optimizer (70B Model Example)

div.p: Timeline (per layer): Layer N: [AllGather][Compute][Release] Layer N+1: [Prefetch ][AllGather][Compute] Layer N+2: [Prefetch ][AllGather] Effective bandwidth increase:
Bandwidth Formula: CommTime = ParamSize / Bandwidth ComputeTime = FLOPs / TFLOPS If ComputeTime > CommTime: No slowdown!

All-Gather Implementation python def gather_parameter(param, dp_group): # Get full parameter via all-gather world_size = dist.get_world_size(dp_group) # Allocate buffer for full parameter full_param = torch.empty( param.shape[0] * world_size, device=param.device, dtype=param.dtype ) # All-gather operation dist.all_gather_into_tensor(full_param, param, group=dp_group) return full_param

Time → Main: ───[PREPARE]────[Barrier]────[COMMIT]────[Write Meta]──→ │ │ │ │ Worker 1: ───┴─[Copy]──[Vote]┴────────────┴──[Write]──────┴───→ Worker 2: ───┴─[Copy]──[Vote]┴────────────┴──[Write]──────┴───→ Worker 3: ───┴─[Copy]──[Vote]┴────────────┴──[Write]──────┴───→ ... Worker N: ───┴─[Copy]──[Vote]┴────────────┴──[Write]──────┴───→ Barrier Points: After PREPARE, after COMMIT
checkpoint/ ├── metadata.json # Global metadata ├── rank_0.pt # Rank 0 state ├── ... └── sharded_tensors/ # ZeRO-3 shards
metadata.json: { "step": 10000, "world_size": 8, "dp_size": 2, "tp_size": 2, "pp_size": 2 }
Asynchronous (Non-Blocking) GPU: [Iter 100][Iter 101][Iter 102] │ ▼ (async handoff) CPU: [Write to SSD ] Blocking Time: ~100ms
python def async_checkpoint(model, step): # Quick copy to CPU state = model.state_dict()._copy_to_cpu() # Hand off to queue checkpoint_queue.put(state)
DP Rank 0 Model Replica (Full)
DP Rank 1 Model Replica (Full)
DP Rank 2 Model Replica (Full)
DP Rank 3 Model Replica (Full)
TP Rank 0 Sharded Weight: W₀ (Columns 0-25%) Local Activation: A₀
TP Rank 1 Sharded Weight: W₁ (Columns 25-50%) Local Activation: A₁
TP Rank 2 Sharded Weight: W₂ (Columns 50-75%) Local Activation: A₂
TP Rank 3 Sharded Weight: W₃ (Columns 75-100%) Local Activation: A₃
Stage 0 (PP Rank 0) Layers: 0-11 Embedding: ✓ Input: token_ids Output: hidden_states
Stage 1 (PP Rank 1) Layers: 12-23 Input: hidden_states Output: hidden_states
Stage 2 (PP Rank 2) Layers: 24-35 Input: hidden_states Output: hidden_states
Stage 3 (PP Rank 3) Layers: 36-47 LM Head: ✓ Input: hidden_states Output: logits
Forward Pass: h = LayerNorm(x) h = h @ W (full weight) h = GeLU(h) Compute Time: ~2ms (overlapped with next all-gather)
After compute:

ul.li: Prefetch next layer Memory peak: during compute Memory steady: shard only

div.p: Main Rank (Rank 0) Role: Coordinator ┌──────────────────────┐ │ 1. Initiate checkpoint│ │ 2. Broadcast PREPARE │ │ 3. Collect votes │ │ 4. Broadcast COMMIT │ │ 5. Write metadata │ └──────────────────────┘
Worker Ranks (1-7) Role: Participants ┌──────────────────────┐ │ 1. Receive PREPARE │ │ 2. Copy state to CPU │ │ 3. Vote READY │ │ 4. Receive COMMIT │ │ 5. Write to storage │ └──────────────────────┘

1. Failure Detection ┌─────────────────────┐ │ GPU 3: FAILURE │ │ (NCCL timeout) │ └─────────────────────┘ │ ▼ ┌─────────────────────┐ │ Health Monitor │ │ detects failure │ └─────────────────────┘ Detection Time: ~1-5s
